SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'dept' TYPE FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = CN
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 <> CN
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 NOT LIKE 'trash\_dept\_%' ESCAPE '\' AND CN NOT LIKE 'trash\_dept\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DISPLAYNAME

SELECT A.CN , A.DISPLAYNAME , A.TYPE FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , 'dept' TYPE , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 NOT LIKE 'trash\_dept\_%' ESCAPE '\' AND CN NOT LIKE 'trash\_dept\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DISPLAYNAME

select.isEqual:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE, TO_CHAR(extensionattribute7) JOBID, 'ROLEID' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , A.MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))) || NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE, b.jobid JOBID, b.roleid ROLEID, 'Y' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND B.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
) AA ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE, TO_CHAR(extensionattribute7) JOBID, 'ROLEID' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , A.MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))) || NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE, b.jobid JOBID, b.roleid ROLEID, 'Y' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC

SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'dept' TYPE, '' JOBID, '' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE, TO_CHAR(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7) JOBID, 'ROLEID' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , A.MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))) || NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE, B.JOBID JOBID, B.ROLEID ROLEID, 'Y' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'dept' TYPE, '' JOBID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ORDER BY TYPE DESC, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC ) ROWNUM_ , CN , DISPLAYNAME , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , TYPE, jobid, roleid, isaddjob FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE, TO_CHAR(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7) jobid, 'ROLEID' roleid, '' isaddjob FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))) || NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE, b.jobid jobid, b.roleid roleid, 'Y' isaddjob FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND B.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
) AA ) BB WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #v_STARTROW# AND ROWNUM_ < #v_ENDROW# ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC

SELECT * FROM( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC ) ROWNUM_ , CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'DEPT' TYPE, '' jobid, '' isaddjob FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #v_STARTROW# AND ROWNUM_ < #v_ENDROW# ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC ) ROWNUM_ , CN, DISPLAYNAME, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, TYPE, JOBID, ISADDJOB FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE, TO_CHAR(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7) jobid, 'ROLEID' roleid, '' isaddjob FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))) || NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE, b.jobid jobid, b.roleid roleid, 'Y' isaddjob FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'DEPT' TYPE, '' jobid, '' isaddjob FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ) BB WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #v_STARTROW# AND ROWNUM_ < #v_ENDROW# ORDER BY TYPE DESC, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME

sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(CN) TOTALCOUNT FROM ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
UNION ALL SELECT B.CN FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND B.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
) AA

SELECT COUNT(CN) TOTALCOUNT FROM ( SELECT C.cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER C WHERE C.tenant_ID = #tenantID# AND cn <> 'masteradmin' AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#) AND C.department IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND (INSTR(dept_cd_path, (SELECT CONCAT(dept_cd_path, ',') from TBL_DEPTMASTER where tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = #deptCN#)) = 1 OR extensionattribute2 = #deptCN#))
AND C.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT D.cn FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER D JOIN TBL_USERMASTER E ON D.tenant_id = E.tenant_id AND D.cn = E.cn WHERE D.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND D.deptid IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE D.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox_%' AND (INSTR(dept_cd_path, (SELECT CONCAT(dept_cd_path, ',') FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = #deptCN#)) = 1) OR extensionattribute2 = #deptCN#)
AND D.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
) AA
SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND extensionattribute1 = #deptCN# AND extensionattribute2 = dept_cd_path

select.isEqual: SELECT CN , CN DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DEPTNM , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE COMPNM2 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , CASE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 WHEN null THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 WHEN null THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 ELSE (SELECT CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER A INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.CN = B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 WHERE B.CN = #v_CN# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'dept' TYPE , TENANT_ID as tenantId, DEPTTREEFLAG, USEUPPERDEPTBOX FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
select.isNotEqual:
SELECT CN , CN DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DEPTNM , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE COMPNM2 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'dept' TYPE , TENANT_ID as tenantId, DEPTTREEFLAG FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = CN

sqlMap.select: SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , MOBILE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , STREETADDRESS , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , (CASE WHEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 IS NULL THEN CAST('' AS NVARCHAR2(200)) ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 END) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , ( CASE WHEN CN = ( SELECT D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D WHERE D.CN = DEPARTMENT AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) THEN ( SELECT E.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER E WHERE E.CN = DEPARTMENT AND E.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 END ) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , SIPURI , POSITIONCD , 'user' USERTYPE, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS COMPANYID, TEAMSID AS teamsId, UPNNAME AS upnName FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND DEPARTMENT = #v_DEPTCD# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , A.DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , A.DISPLAYNAME2 , A.MAIL , C.CN DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END DESCRIPTION , C.DISPLAYNAME DESCRIPTION1 , C.DISPLAYNAME2 DESCRIPTION2 , A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE C.COMPNM2 END COMPANY , C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 COMPANY1 , C.COMPNM2 COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.TITLE ELSE B.TITLE2 END TITLE , B.TITLE TITLE1 , B.TITLE2 TITLE2 , A.TELEPHONENUMBER , A.HOMEPHONE , A.MOBILE , A.FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , A.STREETADDRESS , A.INFO , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , CAST(B.PROXY AS NVARCHAR2(200)) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , ( CASE WHEN A.CN = ( SELECT F.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER F WHERE F.CN = DEPARTMENT AND F.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) THEN ( SELECT G.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER G WHERE G.CN = DEPARTMENT AND G.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) ELSE A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 END ) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , A.ADSPATH , A.UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , SIPURI , B.POSITIONCD , 'addJob' USERTYPE, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS COMPANYID, A.TEAMSID AS teamsId, A.UPNNAME AS upnName FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON B.CN = A.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON C.CN = B.DEPTID AND C.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.CN = #v_CN# AND B.DEPTID = #v_DEPTCD# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

select.isEmpty: SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN '0' ELSE '0' END ROLE , '' ROLE1 , '' ROLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , MOBILE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , STREETADDRESS , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , (CASE WHEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 IS NULL THEN CAST('' AS NVARCHAR2(200)) ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 END) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , SIPURI , POSITIONCD , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME1 , 'user' USERTYPE, USERTREEFLAG, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS COMPANYID, TEAMSID AS teamsId, UPNNAME AS upnName FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND DEPARTMENT = #v_DEPTCD# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
select.isNotEmpty:
SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , A.DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , A.DISPLAYNAME2 , A.MAIL , C.CN DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END DESCRIPTION , C.DISPLAYNAME DESCRIPTION1 , C.DISPLAYNAME2 DESCRIPTION2 , A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME1 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE C.COMPNM2 END COMPANY , C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 COMPANY1 , C.COMPNM2 COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.TITLE ELSE B.TITLE2 END TITLE , B.TITLE TITLE1 , B.TITLE2 TITLE2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.ROLE ELSE B.ROLE2 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , B.ROLE ROLE, B.ROLE ROLE1 , B.ROLE2 ROLE2 , A.TELEPHONENUMBER , A.HOMEPHONE , A.MOBILE , A.FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , A.STREETADDRESS , A.INFO ,
B.ROLL_INFO AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 ,
A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 ,
A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , CAST(B.PROXY AS NVARCHAR2(200)) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , B.JOBID as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , B.ROLEID as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END ORIGIN_ROLE, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , A.ADSPATH , A.UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , SIPURI , B.POSITIONCD , 'addJob' USERTYPE, B.USERTREEFLAG, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS COMPANYID, A.TEAMSID AS teamsId, A.UPNNAME AS upnName FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON B.CN = A.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON C.CN = B.DEPTID AND C.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.CN = #v_CN# AND B.DEPTID = #v_DEPTCD# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND B.JOBID = #JOBID# AND B.ROLEID = #ROLEID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , MAILNICKNAME , UPNNAME , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , STREETADDRESS , POSTALCODE , INFO , REPLACE(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 'a=0;', 'a=1;') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE101 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , ' ' DISPLAYNAMEPRINTABLE , POSITIONCD , BIRTH , BIRTHTYPE , FURIGANA , EXTENSIONPHONE , OFFICEMOBILE , MANUAL_FLAG AS MANUALFLAG FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = LOWER(#v_CN#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE COMPNM2 END COMPANY, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN ROLE ELSE ROLE2 END ROLE FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.DEPTID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #v_PCN# AND A.DEPTID = #v_PDEPT# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND A.JOBID = #v_jobID#
SELECT TITLE, TITLE2, ROLE, ROLE2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPTID = #dept# AND JOBID = #jobID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) > 0
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PROXYINFO SET PROXYUSERID = #v_PROXYUSERID#, PROXYUSERNAME = #v_PROXYUSERNAME#, PROXYUSERDEPTID = #v_PROXYUSERDEPTID#, STARTDATE = TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ENDDATE = TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PROXYINFO ( USERID, PROXYUSERID, PROXYUSERNAME, PROXYUSERDEPTID, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_USERID#, #v_PROXYUSERID#, #v_PROXYUSERNAME#, #v_PROXYUSERDEPTID#, TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #v_TENANT_ID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT
cn, title AS title, birth, birthtype
cn, title2 AS title, birth, birthtype
FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE ((birth LIKE CONCAT('%-', CONCAT(#month#, '-%')) AND birthtype = 'Y') OR (birth <> '' AND birthtype = 'N')) AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId#)
UNION ALL
SELECT
C.displayname AS displayname, A.cn, A.title AS title, C.birth, C.birthtype AS birthtype
C.displayname2 AS displayname, A.cn, A.title2 AS title, C.birth, C.birthtype AS birthtype
FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.deptid = B.cn AND B.extensionattribute2 = #companyId# JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id AND A.cn = C.cn WHERE ((C.birth LIKE CONCAT('%-', CONCAT(#month#, '-%')) AND C.birthtype = 'Y') OR (C.birth <> '' AND C.birthtype = 'N')) AND A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND C.physicaldeliveryofficename <> #companyId# AND A.cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId#) ) ORDER BY SUBSTR(birth, 8, 10)

select.isEqual:
SELECT * FROM(
SELECT cn, department as displayName, n'' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type, displayname as NAME, TO_CHAR(extensionAttribute7) JOBID, '' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_USERMASTER A $strSQL$ AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
AND CN <> 'masteradmin'
AND USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#)
UNION ALL
SELECT A.cn, deptid as displayName, n'' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type, displayname as NAME, A.JOBID JOBID, A.ROLEID ROLEID, 'Y' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID $strGyumjikForOracle$
AND A.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND B.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#)
AND A.DEPTID IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#)
AND A.DEPTID IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#)
UNION ALL
SELECT cn, n'' as displayName, n'' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type, displayname as NAME, '' JOBID, '' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER $strSQL$ AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
AND ROWNUM <= #pLimit#
) ORDER BY type DESC, ISADDJOB ASC, NAME ASC

SELECT cn, n'' as displayName, n'' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type, '' JOBID, '' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER $strSQL$ AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROWNUM as RNUM, cn, displayName, extensionAttribute15, type, jobid, roleid, isaddjob FROM (SELECT cn, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END as userName, department as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, '0' as addJobflag, 'user' as type, TO_CHAR(extensionattribute7) JOBID, '' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_USERMASTER A $strSQL$
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\' AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND CN <> 'masteradmin'
AND A.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT a.cn , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END as userName, deptid as displayName , '' as extensionAttribute15, '1' as addJobflag, 'user' as type, a.jobid JOBID, A.ROLEID ROLEID, 'Y' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_USERMASTER b INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON a.cn = b.cn AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id $strSQL$ AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND A.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND B.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#)
AND A.DEPTID IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#)
) A
ORDER BY A.addJobflag, A.userName
) B WHERE RNUM >= #startRow# AND RNUM < #endRow#

select * from ( SELECT cn, department as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type, TO_CHAR(extensionAttribute7) JOBID, '' JOBID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_USERMASTER A $strSQL$ AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.cn, deptid as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type, b.jobid JOBID, A.roleid ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN $strSQL$ AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID
UNION ALL
SELECT CN, '' as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type, '' JOBID, '' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM
TBL_DEPTMASTER
AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) C WHERE RNUM >= #startRow# AND RNUM < #endRow#

select * from ( SELECT cn, '' as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type, '' JOBID, '' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER $strSQL$ AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A WHERE RNUM >= #startRow# AND RNUM < #endRow#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTALCOUNT FROM ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER A $strSQL$ AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND A.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' UNION ALL
SELECT A.CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON a.cn = b.cn and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id $strSQL$ AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND B.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A

SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE extensionattribute1 = #deptID#
AND extensionattribute2 <> CN
AND DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
SELECT 'top,Top,' || dept_cd_path FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = #deptID# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT cn , cn deptid , CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN displayname ELSE displayname2 END displayname, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN displayname ELSE displayname2 END deptnm, displayname displayname1 , displayname2 , mail , compnm2 , extensionattribute1 , extensionattribute2 , CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN extensionattribute3 ELSE compnm2 END extensionattribute3, extensionattribute4 , extensionattribute5 , extensionattribute6 , extensionattribute7 , extensionattribute8 , extensionattribute9 , extensionattribute10 , extensionattribute11 , extensionattribute12 , extensionattribute13 , extensionattribute14 , extensionattribute15 , adspath , updatedt , 'dept' type, deptTreeFlag, deptlevel, useupperdeptbox FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = #userID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT password FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn = #userID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE mail = #email# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT CONNECTTIME FROM ( SELECT ( RANK() OVER(ORDER BY CONNECTTIME DESC)) AS RNUM, CONNECTTIME FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE USERID = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY CONNECTTIME DESC ) A WHERE A.RNUM='2'

SELECT CONNECTIP FROM ( SELECT ( RANK() OVER(ORDER BY CONNECTTIME DESC)) AS RNUM, CONNECTIP FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE USERID = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY CONNECTTIME DESC ) A WHERE A.RNUM='2'

SELECT CN , TENANT_ID tenantId FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #TENANTID# AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #TENANTID#) AND DEPARTMENT = #v_DEPTID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 LIKE '%a=1;%'
SELECT USERID, PROXYUSERID, PROXYUSERNAME, PROXYUSERDEPTID, STARTDATE, ENDDATE FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userID#
SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #deptId#
SELECT DEPT_CD_PATH FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #deptId#
SELECT CN, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 = #extension4#
SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE '%' || #v_PARENTID# || '%' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_COMPANYID#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #userID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET LISTTYPE = #listType# WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT LISTTYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#
SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT CN, DISPLAYNAME, MAIL FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #deptId# AND (CN LIKE #searchValue# ESCAPE '\' OR DISPLAYNAME LIKE #searchValue# ESCAPE '\') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME
SELECT CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #extensionAttribute9# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER SET PROXY = #proxyInfo# WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPTID = #dept#
AND JOBID = #jobId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT PROXY FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPTID = #dept#
AND TITLE = #title#
SELECT CN ,DEPARTMENT ,TITLE ,TITLE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT physicaldeliveryofficename FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenantid = #tenantId#
SELECT ROLL_INFO FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND JOBID = #v_JOBID#

SELECT CN, DEPARTMENT, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 as jobID FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 LIKE '%' || #v_PERMISSION_CODE# || '%'
UNION ALL SELECT CN, DEPTID , UNISTR(ROLL_INFO) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, UNISTR(jobID) FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND ROLL_INFO LIKE '%' || #v_PERMISSION_CODE# || '%'

SELECT U.CN, D.CN AS DEPARTMENT, J.JOBID AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as COMPANYID, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN J.TITLE ELSE J.TITLE2 END AS TITLE, J.TITLE as TITLE1, J.TITLE2, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DESCRIPTION, D.DISPLAYNAME AS DESCRIPTION1, D.DISPLAYNAME2 AS DESCRIPTION2, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.COMPANY ELSE U.COMPANY2 END AS COMPANY, U.COMPANY AS COMPANY1, U.COMPANY2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER J INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON D.CN = J.DEPTID AND D.TENANT_ID = J.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON U.CN = J.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = J.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_USER_JOBMASTER JM ON J.JOBID = JM.JOBID AND J.TENANT_ID = JM.TENANT_ID
WHERE J.CN = #v_CN# AND J.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY JM."TYPE", JM.SORT, (CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME2 END) ASC

SELECT CN, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1, DISPLAYNAME2, MAIL, DEPARTMENT, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1, DESCRIPTION2, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS COMPANYID, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY, COMPANY COMPANY1, COMPANY2, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE, TITLE TITLE1, TITLE2 TITLE2, TELEPHONENUMBER, HOMEPHONE, MOBILE, FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER, STREETADDRESS, INFO, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, (CASE WHEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 IS NULL THEN CAST('' AS NVARCHAR2(200)) ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 END) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ADSPATH, UPDATEDT, 'user' TYPE, SIPURI, POSITIONCD, 'user' USERTYPE, NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, '') JOBID, CAST('' AS NVARCHAR2(50)) JOBTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 AS ROLEID, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AS ROLEINFO FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME, A.DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1, A.DISPLAYNAME2, A.MAIL, C.CN DEPARTMENT, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END DESCRIPTION, C.DISPLAYNAME DESCRIPTION1, C.DISPLAYNAME2 DESCRIPTION2, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 COMPANYID, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE C.COMPNM2 END COMPANY, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 COMPANY1, C.COMPNM2 COMPANY2, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.TITLE ELSE B.TITLE2 END TITLE, B.TITLE TITLE1, B.TITLE2 TITLE2, A.TELEPHONENUMBER, A.HOMEPHONE, A.MOBILE, A.FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER, A.STREETADDRESS, A.INFO, CAST(B.ROLL_INFO AS NVARCHAR2(200)) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, CAST(B.PROXY AS NVARCHAR2(200)) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.ADSPATH, A.UPDATEDT, 'user' TYPE, SIPURI, B.POSITIONCD, 'addJob' USERTYPE, CAST(B.JOBID AS NVARCHAR2(200)) AS JOBID, J.TYPE AS JOBTYPE, CAST(B.ROLEID AS NVARCHAR2(200)) AS ROLEID, CAST(B.ROLL_INFO AS NVARCHAR2(200)) AS ROLEINFO FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON B.CN = A.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON C.CN = B.DEPTID AND C.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_USER_JOBMASTER J ON J.JOBID = B.JOBID AND J.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.CN = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT MAIL FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT U.DISPLAYNAME AS N , U.DISPLAYNAME2 AS N2 , D.DISPLAYNAME AS T , D.DISPLAYNAME2 AS T2 , ( SELECT D2.DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D2 WHERE D2.CN = D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AND D2.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AS D , ( SELECT D2.DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D2 WHERE D2.CN = D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AND D2.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AS D2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER U JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON U.DEPARTMENT = D.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE U.CN = #v_CN# AND U.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT CN, CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN DisplayName WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN DisplayName2 ELSE DisplayName END AS DisplayName, CASE WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN DisplayName ELSE DisplayName2 END AS DisplayName2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DeptLevel = '1' AND CN != 'Top' ORDER BY LPAD(extensionAttribute15, 20, '0')

select.isEqual:
WITH DEPT_RECURSIVE (data1, data2, displayName, title, description, levelName, department, nodeLevel, nodeIcon, extensionAttribute2, textColor, icon, mail, presence, upnName, mobile, telephoneNumber, teamsId, extensionAttribute10, chargeBusiness, physicalDeliveryOfficeName, addJob, sortOrder) AS ( SELECT 'DEPT' AS data1, CN AS data2, DISPLAYNAME AS displayName, TO_NCHAR('') AS title, TO_NCHAR('') AS description, TO_NCHAR('') AS levelName, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AS department, TO_NUMBER(DEPTLEVEL) AS nodeLevel, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS nodeIcon, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS extensionAttribute2, TO_NCHAR('') AS textColor, 'i_company' AS icon, TO_NCHAR('') AS mail, '' AS presence, TO_NCHAR('') AS upnName, TO_NCHAR('') AS mobile, TO_NCHAR('') AS telephoneNumber, '' AS teamsId, TO_NCHAR('') AS extensionAttribute10, '' AS chargeBusiness, TO_NCHAR('') AS physicalDeliveryOfficeName, 'N' AS addJob, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 AS sortOrder FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash\_dept%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DEPT' AS data1, D.CN AS data2, D.DISPLAYNAME AS displayName, TO_NCHAR('') AS title, TO_NCHAR('') AS description, TO_NCHAR('') AS levelName, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AS department, TO_NUMBER(D.DEPTLEVEL) AS nodeLevel, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS nodeIcon, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS extensionAttribute2, TO_NCHAR('') AS textColor, 'i_company' AS icon, TO_NCHAR('') AS mail, '' AS presence, TO_NCHAR('') AS upnName, TO_NCHAR('') AS mobile, TO_NCHAR('') AS telephoneNumber, '' AS teamsId, TO_NCHAR('') AS extensionAttribute10, '' AS chargeBusiness, TO_NCHAR('') AS physicalDeliveryOfficeName, 'N' AS addJob, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 AS sortOrder FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D INNER JOIN DEPT_RECURSIVE DR ON D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = DR.data2 WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash_dept%' ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM DEPT_RECURSIVE
UNION ALL
SELECT 'USER' AS data1, A.CN AS data2, A.DISPLAYNAME AS displayName, A.TITLE AS title, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.DESCRIPTION WHEN '2' THEN NVL(NULLIF(A.DESCRIPTION2, TO_NCHAR('')), A.DESCRIPTION) WHEN '3' THEN NVL(NULLIF(A.DESCRIPTION3, TO_NCHAR('')), A.DESCRIPTION) ELSE A.DESCRIPTION END AS description, A.POSITIONCD AS levelName, A.DEPARTMENT AS department, NVL(TO_NUMBER(DM.DEPTLEVEL), 0) + 1 AS nodeLevel, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS nodeIcon, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS extensionAttribute2, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 AS textColor, '' AS icon, A.MAIL AS mail, UP.PRESENCE AS presence, A.UPNNAME AS upnName, A.MOBILE AS mobile, A.TELEPHONENUMBER AS telephoneNumber, A.TEAMSID AS teamsId, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 AS extensionAttribute10, '' AS chargeBusiness, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS physicalDeliveryOfficeName, 'N' AS addJob, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 AS sortOrder FROM TBL_USERMASTER A LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER DM ON A.DEPARTMENT = DM.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = DM.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_USERPRESENCE UP ON A.TEAMSID = UP.ID WHERE A.DEPARTMENT IN (SELECT data2 FROM DEPT_RECURSIVE) AND A.CN <> 'masteradmin' AND A.CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT 'USER' AS data1, A.CN AS data2, A.DISPLAYNAME AS displayName, A.TITLE AS title, A.DESCRIPTION AS description, A.POSITIONCD AS levelName, B.DEPTID AS department, NVL(TO_NUMBER(DM.DEPTLEVEL), 0) + 1 AS nodeLevel, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS nodeIcon, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS extensionAttribute2, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 AS textColor, '' AS icon, A.MAIL AS mail, UP.PRESENCE AS presence, A.UPNNAME AS upnName, A.MOBILE AS mobile, A.TELEPHONENUMBER AS telephoneNumber, A.TEAMSID AS teamsId, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 AS extensionAttribute10, '' AS chargeBusiness, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS physicalDeliveryOfficeName, 'Y' AS addJob, B.ORDERBY AS sortOrder FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER DM ON B.DEPTID = DM.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = DM.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_USERPRESENCE UP ON A.TEAMSID = UP.ID WHERE B.DEPTID IN (SELECT data2 FROM DEPT_RECURSIVE) AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) TREE ORDER BY data1 DESC, nodeLevel ASC, sortOrder ASC, displayName ASC

SELECT 'DEPT' AS data1, CN AS data2, DISPLAYNAME AS displayName, '' AS title, '' AS description, '' AS levelName, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AS department, DEPTLEVEL AS nodeLevel, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS nodeIcon, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS extensionAttribute2, '' AS textColor, 'i_company' AS icon, '' AS mail, '' AS presence, '' AS upnName, '' AS mobile, '' AS telephoneNumber, '' AS teamsId, '' AS extensionAttribute10, '' AS chargeBusiness, '' AS physicalDeliveryOfficeName, 'N' AS addJob, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 AS sortOrder FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash\_dept%'

SELECT 'USER' AS data1, A.CN AS data2, A.DISPLAYNAME AS displayName, A.TITLE AS title, A.DESCRIPTION AS description, A.POSITIONCD AS levelName, A.DEPARTMENT AS department, DM.DEPTLEVEL + 1 AS nodeLevel, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS extensionAttribute2, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS nodeIcon, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 AS textColor, '' AS icon, A.MAIL AS mail, UP.PRESENCE AS presence, A.UPNNAME AS upnName, A.MOBILE AS mobile, A.TELEPHONENUMBER AS telephoneNumber, A.TEAMSID AS teamsId, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 AS extensionAttribute10, '' AS chargeBusiness, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS physicalDeliveryOfficeName, 'N' AS addJob, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 AS sortOrder FROM TBL_USERMASTER A LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER DM ON A.DEPARTMENT = DM.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = DM.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_USERPRESENCE UP ON A.TEAMSID = UP.ID WHERE A.DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND A.CN <> 'masteradmin' AND A.CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT 'USER' AS data1, A.CN AS data2, A.DISPLAYNAME AS displayName, A.TITLE AS title, A.DESCRIPTION AS description, A.POSITIONCD AS levelName, B.DEPTID AS department, DM.DEPTLEVEL + 1 AS nodeLevel, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS extensionAttribute2, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS nodeIcon, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 AS textColor, '' AS icon, A.MAIL AS mail, UP.PRESENCE AS presence, A.UPNNAME AS upnName, A.MOBILE AS mobile, A.TELEPHONENUMBER AS telephoneNumber, A.TEAMSID AS teamsId, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 AS extensionAttribute10, '' AS chargeBusiness, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS physicalDeliveryOfficeName, 'Y' AS addJob, B.ORDERBY AS sortOrder FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER DM ON B.DEPTID = DM.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = DM.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_USERPRESENCE UP ON A.TEAMSID = UP.ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT 'USER' AS data1, A.CN AS data2, A.DISPLAYNAME AS displayName, A.TITLE AS title, A.DESCRIPTION AS description, A.POSITIONCD AS levelName, A.DEPARTMENT AS department, DM.DEPTLEVEL + 1 AS nodeLevel, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS nodeIcon, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS extensionAttribute2, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 AS textColor, '' AS icon, A.MAIL AS mail, UP.PRESENCE AS presence, A.UPNNAME AS upnName, A.MOBILE AS mobile, A.TELEPHONENUMBER AS telephoneNumber, A.TEAMSID AS teamsId, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 AS extensionAttribute10, '' AS chargeBusiness, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS physicalDeliveryOfficeName, 'Y' AS addJob, B.ORDERBY AS sortOrder FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER DM ON A.DEPARTMENT = DM.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = DM.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_USERPRESENCE UP ON A.TEAMSID = UP.ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(CN) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE extensionAttribute1 = #v_CN# AND (#v_ADMINFLAG# = 'Y' OR USEFLAG = 'Y')
SELECT UPNNAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET TEAMSID = #v_TEAMSID# WHERE UPNNAME = #v_UPNNAME#
